ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "abbreviated_name" TEXT /* Abbreviated name of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* Logo URL of the team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_start" INTEGER /* Year the season started */,
  "season_end" INTEGER /* Year the season ended */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of the season (Regular Season or Playoffs) */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_winner FOREIGN KEY ("winner") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is accessing data for */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Name of the team's home stadium
Seating capacity of the team's home stadium
Type of the season (Regular Season or Playoffs)
ID of the team that won the championship
Role of the user (admin, analyst, viewer)
ID of the team the user is affiliated with
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the user accessing the data
ID of the team the user is accessing data for
Date when the data was accessed
